subsystems.name: Dashboard / UI Layer
real_components: Portal pages backed by Supabase (deals, contacts, matches, properties)
Auth via NextAuth + Google OAuth
Rate-limit headers on all API routes
SLO tracking via lib/sre/sloTracker.ts → Supabase trace_spans
Control Tower reads live Supabase table counts
Prometheus metrics endpoint (/api/metrics) reads 8 Supabase tables
partial_components: INTERNAL_API_BASE must be set to production URL or Control Tower panels show empty state
Prometheus scrape works but most SLOs (all except api-availability) return UNKNOWN status
subsystems.action_required: Set INTERNAL_API_BASE to production domain. Configure REVENUE_TARGET_EUR for CEO dashboard.

subsystems.name: CRM (contacts, deals, pipeline)
real_components: Full CRUD on deals table in Supabase — no mock fallback (503 if DB unavailable)
Contacts upsert via partner form → Supabase contacts table
Matches read from Supabase matches table
Stage transitions emit typed events (dealStageAdvanced, dealClosed, etc.)
Causal trace steps recorded on every mutation
ML feedback loop (recordDealOutcome) called on terminal stages
Audit ledger entries written at CPCV + Escritura stages
partial_components: Notion integration (NOTION_DEALS_DB) configured but sync is fire-and-forget, not verified
WhatsApp alerts require ALERT_WHATSAPP_PHONE + Twilio/Meta credentials
missing_external_services: Notion sync (optional)
WhatsApp Business (optional for alerts)
subsystems.action_required: None critical. Notion + WhatsApp are optional enrichments.

subsystems.name: Capital Flows (escrow, PSP, bank)
real_components: EscrowLayer persists escrow records to Supabase escrow_positions table
PSP Orchestrator tries Stripe → Adyen → SEPA_DIRECT fallback
Stripe SDK installed (stripe ^22.0.2 in package.json) and called when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY set
psp_payment_intents table records every intent regardless of provider
Bank reconciliation engine reads bank_statement_lines from Supabase
partial_components: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is commented out in .env.example — not wired for production
Adyen integration calls checkout-test.adyen.com (TEST environment, not production)
SEPA_DIRECT fallback generates a UUID reference — no actual SEPA transfer occurs
escrowLayer.generateReferenceCode uses Math.random() (cosmetic only, does not affect data integrity)
Bank reconciliation reads from Supabase but has no real bank feed connector (manual CSV import assumed)
simulated_components: SEPA_DIRECT fallback: creates intent record but sends no real payment instruction
missing_external_services: Stripe production account + webhook endpoint
Adyen production credentials (currently test env)
Real bank feed / SEPA connector (Wise, Modulr, or BBVA Open Platform)
subsystems.action_required: Configure STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Switch Adyen to production URL. Integrate real bank statement feed for reconciliation.

subsystems.name: Ledger (double-entry)
real_components: postJournalEntry writes to journal_entries table with idempotency_key dedup
updateAccountBalance updates ledger_accounts.balance_cents in Supabase
BigInt cents arithmetic throughout — no float errors
getTrialBalance checks debit/credit equality and warns if out of balance
recordCommissionRevenue + recordEscrowReceipt + recordEscrowRelease are real entry points
TransactionFeeEngine: pure bigint computation for PT/ES taxes (IMT 6%, stamp 0.8%, notary flat)
Economics auditLedger appendEntry called at CPCV and Escritura stages from deals API
Tier-based commission rates (4–5%) computed and persisted on deal closure
partial_components: Ledger accounts balance_cents stored as Number in DB (loses precision above 2^53 cents — ~€90 trillion, practically safe)
No external audit trail export (regulatory reporting to AT not connected)
missing_external_services: AT (Autoridade Tributária) reporting API — not yet required
subsystems.action_required: Consider switching balance_cents to NUMERIC in Supabase schema to avoid theoretical BigInt precision loss at scale.

subsystems.name: ML Engines (scoring, optimization)
real_components: ML feature snapshots written to ml_feature_snapshots in Supabase
recordDealOutcome labels snapshots when deals close — real training data accumulation
ML model registry reads/writes from ml_model_registry Supabase table
capitalAllocationOptimizer reads real property + investor data from Supabase
featureExtractor reads from properties, matches, deals tables
Model weights loaded from filesystem (JSON) when present
partial_components: All predictors (yieldPredictor, conversionPredictor) are heuristic baselines — no trained XGBoost/LightGBM models deployed
model_id defaults to 'heuristic-v1' — no real ML inference
scoreWithWeights returns score=50 for heuristic model type
ML drift detection reads from ml_reality_alignments but SLO returns UNKNOWN (no real drift data)
simulated_components: yield prediction: heuristic rules only (geo_tier table lookup, not trained model)
conversion prediction: heuristic probability estimates, not calibrated model
missing_external_services: Python training pipeline (XGBoost/LightGBM) — must train models and export weights.json to filesystem
Model serving infrastructure for real-time inference
subsystems.action_required: Run training pipeline on accumulated ml_feature_snapshots data. Export trained weights.json files. modelLoader.ts will pick them up automatically.

subsystems.name: Market Data Ingestion (Idealista, Casafari, etc.)
real_components: idealistaClient.ts: real OAuth2 fetch to api.idealista.com when IDEALISTA_API_KEY set
casafariClient.ts: real REST fetch to Casafari v3 API when CASAFARI_API_KEY set
imovirtualAdapter: real HTML scraping of imovirtual.com (public, no auth required)
bankListingsAdapter: real scraping of e-leiloes.pt + portaldasfinancas.gov.pt (public)
Ingestion pipeline deduplicates and upserts to properties table
normalizationPipeline.ts normalizes listings to canonical schema
partial_components: IDEALISTA_API_KEY not set → returns 3 hardcoded MOCK properties (explicitly labelled [MOCK])
CASAFARI_API_KEY not set → returns [] gracefully
No scheduled ingestion trigger configured (no cron or n8n workflow confirmed active)
Imovirtual and e-Leiloes scrapers rely on HTML structure stability — fragile
simulated_components: idealista-api.ts MOCK_PROPERTIES: 3 hardcoded properties returned when API key absent
missing_external_services: Idealista commercial API contract (requires application to developers.idealista.com)
Casafari API subscription (~€200-500/month)
Active n8n/cron schedule to trigger ingestion pipeline
subsystems.action_required: HIGH: Apply for Idealista API contract. Subscribe to Casafari. Set up cron trigger for /api/ingestion/run or n8n workflow.

subsystems.name: Event System (learning events, flywheel)
real_components: EventBus writes to learning_events Supabase table — always persists even if Redis unavailable
30+ typed event producers covering full deal lifecycle
DLQ: failed events written back to learning_events with metadata.dlq=true
Deduplication: Upstash Redis SETNX when configured, in-memory Map fallback
feedbackFlywheelEngine reads from learning_events and writes scored outcomes
Kafka infrastructure code exists (kafkaClient.ts, kafkaAdapter.ts) with dual-write pattern
partial_components: Kafka: KAFKA_BROKERS not in .env.example — assumed not configured, falls back to Supabase only
Event consumers (dealEventConsumer, propertyEventConsumer) exist but no active worker process confirmed
Upstash Redis dedup requires UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL + UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN
missing_external_services: Upstash Redis (for distributed dedup — in-memory fallback works but resets on cold start)
Kafka/Redpanda broker (optional — Supabase fallback is production-safe)
subsystems.action_required: Configure Upstash Redis for distributed event dedup. Kafka is optional — Supabase fallback is sufficient for current scale.

subsystems.name: Security (Zero Trust, RBAC, encryption)
real_components: RBAC matrix (ADMIN/OPERATOR/ANALYST/INVESTOR/AUDITOR/READONLY) with 12 permission types
evaluateAccess is pure synchronous function — no mocks
createSessionToken persists to security_sessions Supabase table with SHA-256 token hash
MFA required for capital:execute and legal:sign permissions
JIT elevation tracked in session context
next.config.ts: full CSP, HSTS preload, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy headers
Auth guard on every sensitive API route (deals, contacts, matches, etc.)
safeCompare (constant-time) used for all secret comparisons
partial_components: ZeroTrust session management stores to Supabase but NextAuth remains primary auth — ZeroTrust sessions are supplementary
MFA is modeled but TOTP/WebAuthn integration not confirmed wired to auth flow
runtime secret scanner exists but ADMIN_SECRET, PORTAL_API_SECRET not in .env.example
subsystems.action_required: Wire MFA TOTP verification to NextAuth session. Ensure all INTERNAL_API_SECRET values are set in Vercel.

subsystems.name: Compliance (GDPR, AML/KYC, tax)
real_components: amlKycEngine.ts: initiateKyc writes to kyc_records Supabase table
processKycWebhook: parses SumSub + Onfido webhook payloads correctly
FATF high-risk country list checked on KYC initiation
EU AML €15,000 threshold constant defined (BigInt)
MiFID II tier classification logic present
GDPR SLO defined (100% requests within 30 days) — measured from kyc_records
partial_components: SUMSUB_API_KEY not in .env.example — KYC falls back to MANUAL provider
ONFIDO_API_KEY not in .env.example — never activates
With MANUAL provider: no external identity verification occurs — operator must approve manually
Tax reporting (AT/SEPA) not connected
GDPR data deletion cron exists in lib but scheduling not confirmed
simulated_components: KYC with MANUAL provider: creates record with status=PENDING but no actual identity check performed
missing_external_services: SumSub or Onfido commercial account for real KYC
AT (Autoridade Tributária) API for IMT/stamp duty reporting
GDPR request processor (manual process currently)
subsystems.action_required: HIGH for live capital operations: integrate SumSub or Onfido. All AML-gated capital flows require real KYC approval.

subsystems.name: Observability (metrics, tracing, SLOs)
real_components: Prometheus endpoint (/api/metrics) reads 8 Supabase tables and emits real gauge values
Causal trace spans written to trace_spans Supabase table on every deal mutation
SLO engine reads from trace_spans for api-availability SLO (real measurement)
Anomaly detection engine reads/writes anomaly_alerts in Supabase
Sentry SDK installed and configured (SENTRY_DSN required)
OpenTelemetry SDK present in dependencies
SRE status endpoint aggregates SLO + DR status
partial_components: 6 of 7 SLOs return UNKNOWN (supply-freshness, capital-execution, ml-accuracy, data-quality, kyc-compliance, gdpr-deadline need more data/code)
OpenTelemetry exporter requires OTEL endpoint — not in .env.example
performance_snapshots table must be populated by cron for metrics to show non-zero values
Sentry only active if SENTRY_DSN set
missing_external_services: Sentry project (for error tracking)
Prometheus + Grafana or equivalent (for metrics visualization)
OpenTelemetry collector (optional)
subsystems.action_required: Set SENTRY_DSN. Configure performance_snapshots cron. Implement remaining SLO measurements in sloEngine.ts.

subsystems.name: Legal Execution (notary, land registry, eIDAS)
real_components: requestNotaryAppointment persists to notary_appointments Supabase table always
eIdasQesEngine.ts: signature requests persisted to eidas_signature_requests table
legalExecutionPipeline.ts: workflow states tracked in Supabase
Document lifecycle tracked with signed status
partial_components: NOTARY_API_KEY not in .env.example — external notary API call is graceful no-op
notary_code generated as NTC-{timestamp} when API unavailable (not a real notary ref)
EIDAS_API_KEY + EIDAS_PROVIDER_URL not in .env.example — no actual QES provider wired
No Portuguese notary API vendor identified (api.notarios.pt URL is placeholder)
simulated_components: Notary appointment without NOTARY_API_KEY: creates record with generated reference, no real confirmation
eIDAS without provider: signature status stays PENDING — no actual electronic signature
missing_external_services: Portuguese notary API (no public API exists — manual process in PT currently)
eIDAS QES provider (DocuSign eIDAS / Scrive / Uanataca / Certilabis)
subsystems.action_required: HIGH for capital deployment: integrate real eIDAS QES provider (recommend Uanataca or Scrive for Portugal). Notary scheduling remains manual in Portugal.

subsystems.name: Financial Rails (SEPA, SWIFT, PSP)
real_components: PSP Orchestrator: Stripe integration is real when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY set
Adyen integration: real HTTP call to Adyen API when ADYEN_API_KEY set
All payment intents persisted to psp_payment_intents Supabase table
bankReconciliationEngine reads bank_statement_lines from Supabase
partial_components: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY commented out in .env.example — not production-ready
Adyen calls checkout-test.adyen.com (test environment)
SEPA_DIRECT fallback: only creates a UUID reference — no actual payment sent
No SWIFT integration implemented
Bank statement import is manual (no automated bank feed connector)
simulated_components: SEPA_DIRECT path: createSepaFallback() returns randomUUID — no real payment instruction emitted
missing_external_services: Stripe production account with real payment method
Adyen production merchant account
SEPA direct debit mandate infrastructure
SWIFT wire intermediary bank
Automated bank feed (GoCardless / Plaid / Nordigen / Modulr)
subsystems.action_required: CRITICAL before any real capital flows: configure STRIPE_SECRET_KEY (production). Switch Adyen to production endpoint. SEPA transfers require a licensed payment institution.

subsystems.name: Disaster Recovery (backup, replay, DR test)
real_components: scheduleBackup writes to backup_records Supabase table
markBackupCompleted + recordReplicationStatus update backup status
getDrTestSummary reads from dr_test_results Supabase table
computeRpo reads from event_sourcing_log Supabase table
runDataIntegrityCheck runs row count + checksum verification against Supabase
DR status route exposes full backup health + DR test summary
partial_components: storage_path uses s3://ag-backups-... URL — S3 bucket may not exist; no actual backup file written
Backup orchestrator schedules records but does not execute actual pg_dump or Supabase PITR
Cross-region replication relies on recordReplicationStatus being called externally
Backup integrity check: checksum_sha256 is null until markBackupCompleted is called (no self-verification)
DR test scheduling creates records but no automated test execution
simulated_components: scheduleBackup: record created in Supabase but no real backup data written to S3
missing_external_services: AWS S3 bucket (for backup storage)
Supabase PITR (Point-In-Time Recovery) enabled on project
Automated backup execution job (pg_dump or Supabase scheduled exports)
subsystems.action_required: Enable Supabase PITR. Create S3 bucket ag-backups-*. Wire backup execution to actually dump and upload data.

subsystems.name: Institutional API (market data publishing)
real_components: validateInstitutionalKey reads from institutional_api_keys Supabase table
checkRateLimit + recordApiCall persist to Supabase
assembleMarketDataPackage reads from canonical_assets_v2 + opportunity_scores
publishMarketDataPackages writes to institutional_market_data Supabase table
Delivery metrics tracked in institutional_deliveries table
Auth + rate limiting by client tier fully implemented
partial_components: Market data package quality depends entirely on supply ingestion being active
No external institutional clients configured yet (empty api keys table until seeded)
OLI / ICS / LVI scores are computed from internal data — validity depends on real ingestion data
missing_external_services: Institutional client onboarding (manual API key provisioning required)
Real property supply data flowing through ingestion pipeline
subsystems.action_required: Activate supply ingestion (subsystem 6) first. Then provision institutional API keys for target clients.

subsystems.name: Supply Ingestion (property data providers)
real_components: Idealista client: real OAuth2 call when IDEALISTA_API_KEY set
Casafari client: real REST call when CASAFARI_API_KEY set
Imovirtual adapter: real HTML scraping (no auth required) — public data
e-Leiloes adapter: real scraping of public Portuguese judicial auction portal
Ingestion pipeline deduplicates, normalizes and upserts to properties Supabase table
Canonical pipeline with dedup engine and normalization layer exists
backpressureBuffer.ts prevents Supabase write overload
partial_components: Idealista: IDEALISTA_API_KEY not set → returns 3 MOCK hardcoded properties
Casafari: CASAFARI_API_KEY not set → returns [] (empty result, no crash)
No confirmed active cron/scheduler to trigger pipeline runs
imovirtualAdapter depends on HTML structure which may change without notice
e-Leiloes scraper: extracts from HTML — legally permitted but structurally fragile
simulated_components: idealista-api.ts: MOCK_PROPERTIES[3] returned when API key absent — explicitly flagged as [MOCK]
missing_external_services: Idealista commercial API contract
Casafari API subscription
Active cron job or n8n workflow to trigger /api/ingestion/run
subsystems.action_required: HIGHEST PRIORITY: activate Idealista + Casafari credentials. Set up cron schedule. Without real supply data, ML scoring, institutional API, and opportunity intelligence are all degraded.

critical_gaps.gap: No real property data provider connected — Idealista returns MOCK, Casafari returns empty
critical_gaps.fix: Apply for Idealista API contract at developers.idealista.com and subscribe to Casafari. Set IDEALISTA_API_KEY + IDEALISTA_SECRET + CASAFARI_API_KEY. Configure cron trigger.

critical_gaps.gap: No real KYC/AML provider — all KYC falls back to MANUAL (no identity verification)
critical_gaps.fix: Subscribe to SumSub or Onfido. Set SUMSUB_API_KEY or ONFIDO_API_KEY. Legally required before accepting investor capital.

critical_gaps.gap: Financial rails not production-ready — STRIPE_SECRET_KEY commented out, SEPA fallback is UUID-only
critical_gaps.fix: Configure STRIPE_SECRET_KEY (production). Switch Adyen to production URL. Engage a licensed payment institution for SEPA.

critical_gaps.gap: No eIDAS QES provider connected — electronic signatures for CPCV/Escritura not functional
critical_gaps.fix: Integrate Uanataca, Scrive, or Certilabis for eIDAS QES. Set EIDAS_API_KEY + EIDAS_PROVIDER_URL.

critical_gaps.gap: ML models are heuristic-only — no trained XGBoost/LightGBM models deployed
critical_gaps.fix: Run Python training pipeline on ml_feature_snapshots data. Export weights.json files. modelLoader.ts picks them up automatically.

critical_gaps.gap: Backup orchestrator creates Supabase records but does not write real backup data to S3
critical_gaps.fix: Enable Supabase PITR. Create AWS S3 bucket. Implement actual backup execution job calling pg_dump or Supabase scheduled exports.

critical_gaps.gap: INTERNAL_API_BASE not configured — Control Tower panels show empty/skeleton state in Vercel
critical_gaps.fix: Set INTERNAL_API_BASE=https://www.agencygroup.pt (or production Vercel URL) in Vercel environment.

critical_gaps.gap: 6 of 7 SLOs return UNKNOWN status — observability is partial
critical_gaps.fix: Implement remaining SLO measurements in lib/sre/sloEngine.ts. Populate performance_snapshots via scheduled cron.

required_before_live: Stripe production account (for real payment processing)
optional: Casafari API (premium property data — fallback to Idealista + scrapers)
Adyen (alternative PSP — Stripe alone sufficient for MVP)
AWS S3 (Supabase PITR is sufficient backup for MVP)
HeyGen (Sofia AI video — feature, not core)
WhatsApp Business Meta API (alerts — Resend email sufficient for MVP)
n8n automation (manually triggerable routes exist as fallback)

system_summary.notes: No subsystem is fully NOT_BUILT — all have working code. 'not_built_count=1' refers to the SEPA/SWIFT direct payment execution path which exists as a placeholder UUID generator only. The platform is production-ready for CRM, Ledger, Events, and Dashboard. Capital flows, KYC, Legal execution, and Supply ingestion need real external credentials before going live with real transactions.
